metaTitle: PDF Redact — Permanently Remove Sensitive Data (100% Secure & Private)
metaDescription: Securely black out and permanently delete sensitive information from PDFs. Our tool destroys the original text layer by converting pages to high-resolution images. No recovery possible.
introSummary: Protect your privacy with the most secure PDF Redaction tool available online. Unlike basic editors that simply hide text behind black boxes, our 'Secure Redaction' engine physically destroys the underlying data. By rendering each page into a high-definition image and 'burning' your redactions into the pixels, we ensure that no software, hacker, or search tool can ever recover your hidden information. Process your sensitive legal, medical, or financial documents entirely on-device with zero server uploads.

contextUsage.title: For Legal & Compliance
contextUsage.desc: Anonymize court documents or contracts by permanently removing client names, PII, and trade secrets before public filing.

contextUsage.title: For Government & HR
contextUsage.desc: Safely redact social security numbers, home addresses, and private health information from employee records or public notices.

contextUsage.title: For Financial Reports
contextUsage.desc: Mask sensitive bank account numbers or internal cost structures in corporate reports before sharing them with external stakeholders.

howto.description: Drag and drop your file. Our local engine parses the PDF instantly in your browser's sandbox—your file never leaves your computer.
Use your mouse or touch to draw black boxes over sensitive text, signatures, or images. You can add multiple redaction areas on every page.
Click 'Apply Redactions'. Our engine converts the PDF pages into high-resolution images, physically erasing the original text and metadata layers.
Save your new, securely redacted PDF. The result is a 'flat' document where the hidden data is non-recoverable and non-searchable.

why: True Data Destruction — We don't just hide text; we destroy the digital objects. No 'Select All' or 'Copy-Paste' tricks can reveal what you've hidden.
Image-Based Security — By converting pages to images, we eliminate hidden metadata, OCR layers, and structural info that could leak data.
On-Device Processing — Powered by pdf-lib and PDF.js, all redaction happens in your browser's memory. Absolute privacy for your most sensitive files.
High-Resolution Output — We render pages at 200% scale (High DPI) to ensure your redacted documents remain crisp and professional for printing.
Zero Traces Left Behind — Once you close the tab, all document data is wiped from your browser's temporary memory. No persistent storage used.
No Account Required — Use our professional-grade security tools for free, with no daily limits, subscriptions, or forced registration.

faq.q: Can someone 'un-redact' my file to see what's underneath?
faq.a: No. Because we convert the page into an image, the original text characters no longer exist in the file. It is physically impossible to 'remove' the black boxes.

faq.q: Does this remove hidden metadata like 'Author' or 'Location'?
faq.a: Yes. Our secure redaction process creates a fresh PDF from scratch, effectively stripping away all original hidden properties and revision history.

faq.q: Is my original file uploaded to your servers?
faq.a: Never. This is a 100% serverless utility. Your document stays in your RAM and is processed locally. We never see your data.

faq.q: Can I redact images and signatures as well as text?
faq.a: Yes. Since you are selecting areas on a canvas, you can redact anything—text, photos, logos, or handwritten signatures.

faq.q: Will the redacted PDF be searchable?
faq.a: The areas you don't redact will still be visible, but since the page is now an image, the text is no longer 'selectable' or 'searchable' by default, which is the highest level of security.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Ensures physical destruction of underlying text objects
Maintains sharp visual quality for professional document standards
Compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and strict internal security policies
Standardized output compatible with all PDF viewers and printers
Protects against supply-chain attacks using subresource integrity

troubleshooting: Text still visible? Ensure you have clicked 'Apply Redactions' and downloaded the new file, rather than just taking a screenshot of the preview.
File size increased? Converting PDF pages to high-res images can increase file size. This is the trade-off for 100% unrecoverable security.
Black boxes misaligned? If the PDF has unusual rotation or scaling, try refreshing the tool and re-uploading the file for a clean render.
proTips: Double-check page numbers! Make sure you've scanned every page for sensitive info before hitting 'Apply'.
Use this for signatures! Redacting signatures on sensitive contracts is the best way to prevent identity theft when sharing documents publicly.
Need searchability back? If you need the non-redacted parts to be searchable again, you can run the output file through an OCR tool after redaction.
